title: Vercel Connect: Secure access to external services for your agents
summary: Vercel Connect: Secure access to external services for your agents
whyItMatters: Vercel Connect lets your apps and agents access external services like Slack, GitHub, Salesforce, and your own custom APIs without storing a long-lived provider secret in your environment. You register a connector once, and your code requests scoped, short-lived tokens at runtime, only when it needs them. You can create a connector from your dashboard or th…
